title: %Error: Internal Error: ...: ../V3Slice.cpp:418: Couldn't find a VarRef on the LHSP of an Assign
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 499 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-04-28
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

After #^A fix, I am getting this internal error.

Source code:

```
  syncram the_syncram
     (
       .address_a (wraddress),
       .address_b (rdaddress),
       .clock0 (clock),
...

```

The error is on the last line.

clock0 is declared as:

```
module syncram   (
                     wren_a,
                     wren_b,
                     rden_a,
                     rden_b,
                     data_a,
                     data_b,
                     address_a,
                     address_b,
                     clock0,
                     clock1,
...
     input  clock0;
...
     tri1 clock0;

```
